sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88989" key="prosekde/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεκ-δέρω</orth>, <sense id="n88989.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flay besides</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0500.tlg001:26:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Posidipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26.14</biblScope> </bibl> (Dind. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρὸς ἐκδαρεἱς</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
